headline: What Advanced Micro Devices (AMD)'s Expanded Samsung AI Memory Partnership Means For Shareholders
summary: On 18 March 2026, Samsung Electronics announced it had signed a Memorandum of Understanding with AMD to expand collaboration on next-generation AI memory and computing, including primary HBM4 supply for the Instinct MI455X GPU and advanced DDR5 for 6th Gen EPYC “Venice” CPUs, while also exploring future foundry manufacturing. This move not only deepens AMD’s access to critical AI memory but also opens the door to a second manufacturing partner beyond its existing foundry relationships,...

This move not only deepens AMD’s access to critical AI memory but also opens the door to a second manufacturing partner beyond its existing foundry relationships,...

headline: Is Intel’s (INTC) 6G AI-RAN Push With Viettel a Signal on Its Future Moat?
summary: In early March 2026, Viettel High Tech announced new collaborations with Intel, AMD and ID Quantique to co-develop 5G Advanced and 6G technologies, focusing on AI-optimized RAN, cloud-native networks and quantum-safe security. This positions Intel more deeply inside the emerging 6G and AI-RAN ecosystem, extending its reach beyond chips into next-generation network architecture and standards-setting. We’ll now examine how Intel’s expanded role in AI-optimized 6G networks and infrastructure...
